pi_items.source: Task description strictly dictates this exact synthetic value, though the true CWA latitude is 25.0397 N.
Task description strictly dictates this exact synthetic value, though the true CWA longitude is 121.5067 E.
Task description strictly dictates this exact synthetic value, though the true CWA altitude is ~6.3m.
Web search for official COSMIC-2 (FORMOSAT-7) NORAD IDs. The claimed IDs belong to CZ-11 DEB (Long March 11 rocket space debris).
Official satellite registries confirm FORMOSAT-7 satellites have different IDs. 44327-44332 are debris.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions and evaluation scripts strictly enforce a synthetic scenario involving slightly inaccurate Taipei Central Weather Administration coordinates (25.0380 N, 121.5030 E). Critically, the task fabricates the NORAD IDs for the six COSMIC-2 (FORMOSAT-7) satellites, asserting they are 44327 through 44332. In reality, official registries confirm those IDs belong to space debris from a Long March 11 rocket, while the true FORMOSAT-7 satellites possess IDs 44349, 44351, 44343, 44350, 44358, and 44353. Furthermore, because these fabricated IDs are not present in the provided TLE cache files (weather.txt, amateur.txt, stations.txt), it is impossible for the agent to find and add the satellites via GPredict's standard GUI search interface. To succeed, the agent would likely have to circumvent the GUI by manually injecting the fake NORAD IDs into the application's underlying .mod configuration files.
